description: MCP server for 1Password service accounts — tools and resources for vaults and credentials
name: io.github.CakeRepository/1password

environmentVariables.description: The Service Account Token from 1Password (required unless OP_KEYCHAIN_SERVICE is used on macOS)
environmentVariables.name: OP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN

environmentVariables.description: macOS only: Keychain service name to read the 1Password service account token from when OP_SERVICE_ACCOUNT_TOKEN is not set
environmentVariables.name: OP_KEYCHAIN_SERVICE

environmentVariables.description: macOS only: Optional Keychain account name to narrow the lookup used with OP_KEYCHAIN_SERVICE
environmentVariables.name: OP_KEYCHAIN_ACCOUNT
